mapper.select: select question_id,question,answer from question where username = #{username} and star = 1 limit #{start_count},5
select question_id,question,answer from question where username = #{username} and question like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') and star = 1 limit #{start_count},5
select count(*) from question where username = #{username} and star = 1
select count(*) from question where username = #{username} and question like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') and star = 1
select count(*) from question where username = #{username} and question like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')
select question_id,question,answer from question where username = #{username} limit #{start_count},5
select question_id,question,answer from question where username = #{username} and question like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') limit #{start_count},5
